title: Security: UAF in RTCQuicTransport due to iterator invalidation
description_snippet:
**VULNERABILITY DETAILS**   
  
Promises in JavaScript are not resolved synchronously; a microtask is posted to run the callback. But according to the spec for promise resolution (https://tc39.es/ecma262/#sec-promise-resolve-functions), when |resolution| is an object, |Get(resolution, "then")| will
